# Pamplona

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/cbr-vial/)

## Contact
- Website: https://pamplona.geotecnia1.biz/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
